pentacles.theme: Material world, abundance, career, physical reality

imagery.traditionalElements: Hand emerging from cloud holding pentacle, garden with path and mountains
imagery.quantumElements: Hand offering quantum manifestation node, material reality emerging from potential
imagery.paganElements: Seed of manifestation, material abundance, earthly gifts

upright.description: New financial or career opportunities, manifestation
upright.quantumInterpretation: Quantum measurement into material reality - potential becoming actual

reversed.description: Missed opportunities or poor financial planning
reversed.quantumInterpretation: Failed quantum measurement - potential not actualizing into reality

imagery.traditionalElements: Juggler with two pentacles, ships on rough sea, infinity loop
imagery.quantumElements: Quantum system balancing multiple resource streams, adaptive resource allocation, dynamic equilibrium
imagery.paganElements: Balance, adaptability, resource management, flow with change
imagery.colorPalette: Balance green, flow blue, earth brown

upright.description: Balance, adaptability, and managing multiple priorities
upright.quantumInterpretation: Quantum resource balancing - maintaining coherence across multiple material streams

reversed.quantumInterpretation: Resource imbalance - quantum system losing coherence across material allocations

imagery.traditionalElements: Craftsman showing work to monk and noble, cathedral interior
imagery.quantumElements: Quantum systems collaborating on material projects, skill integration, masterwork creation
imagery.paganElements: Teamwork, craftsmanship, skill development, collaborative creation

upright.quantumInterpretation: Quantum collaborative manifestation - multiple systems integrating skills for material creation

reversed.description: Lack of teamwork, disorganization, or poor quality
reversed.quantumInterpretation: Collaborative failure - quantum systems failing to integrate material efforts

imagery.traditionalElements: Figure clutching four pentacles, one on head, two under feet, one held close

reversed.quantumInterpretation: Resource hoarding - quantum system becoming overly conservative and rigid

imagery.traditionalElements: Two figures in snow outside stained glass window, five pentacles in window

reversed.quantumInterpretation: Resource recovery - quantum system beginning material restoration processes

reversed.description: Power dynamics, strings attached, or inequality

reversed.description: Lack of growth, impatience, or poor investment
